backendOntology.description: Cross-project palantir-mini plugin universalization: event log + codegen + RBAC + verify pipeline

principles.notes: DDD via 5-domain classification; DRY via shared schemas; OCP via plugin extension; PECS via idempotent pm-init

stackRecommendation.language: TypeScript + Bun (zero dependencies for MCP bridge)
stackRecommendation.mcp: stdio transport; 5 tools (emit_event, get_ontology, replay_lineage, apply_edit_function, commit_edits)
stackRecommendation.schemaDistribution: filesystem reference with semver pin (Option B); graduate to npm package later (Option A)
stackRecommendation.storage: per-project append-only events.jsonl + ontology-state/*.json; no daemon, no database

backward.description: runtime events → lineage → evaluations → refinement → ontology updates
steps: drift events → CHANGELOG entry → schema semver bump → projects rerun pm-codegen

goldenTables.description: Every project has complete events.jsonl + ontology-state/ after pm-init

operationalDecisionMaking.description: Every ontology edit is pre-validated via pm-verify + enforced by hooks

aiFirst.description: Subagents reason over structured ontology via MCP tools; zero schema guessing

considered.label: Per-project opt-in (no global install)
considered.rejected: Higher setup friction; MCP must be registered per-project

considered.label: Global daemon (~/.palantir-mini/)
considered.rejected: Operational complexity; persistent process lifecycle burden; blast radius
considered.preservedAs: Escalation path if multi-user requires central coordination

considered.label: Claude Code plugin (MCP-first, no per-project state)
considered.rejected: Missing per-project event log; no RBAC fragment

winner.label: Compound: plugin marketplace (L1) + pm-init per-project (L2) + events.jsonl cross-project propagation (L3)
winner.winRationale: Dominates 10/11 dimensions; graceful degradation to H-A under plugin-system breakage; bounded blast radius via per-project RBAC; reuses Brain v2 events.jsonl prior art (0 lost / 2000 events verified).

claims.claim: Foundry Marketplace distributes shared ontology artifacts
OSDK 2.0 generates typed client packages with version pinning
Claude Code v2.1.110 plugin marketplace supports mcpServers registration
Decision Lineage uses 5-dim append-only event log

prototype.reason: Existing palantir-mini plugin v0.1.0 serves as validated substrate (Brain v2 session). v0.2.0 is additive manifest change + idempotency hardening, not new invention.

eventsEmitted: (pending) evt-univ-blueprint-ready-005 (blueprint_ready — emitted after this file is written)
